title: Create GET /api/agent/context endpoint + unit test
implementation_notes: Call buildVaultReadModel() (same pattern as read-model.get.ts — import from app/server/services/vault/read.ts).
Return a lightweight summary object — do NOT return the full read-model:

{ workspaceId: string|null, workspaceName: string|null, projects: Array<{id, name, boardCount}>, openTaskCount: number, pendingApprovalCount: number, boardSummary: Array<{id, name, columnSummary: Array<{id, name, taskCount}>}> }
- assert correct field projection (no raw vault objects leaked)
The VaultReadModel type is at app/server/models/read-model.ts:1 — check ReadModelWorkspace, ReadModelProject, ReadModelBoard, ReadModelTask, ReadModelApproval types for exact field names.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/agent/context returns 200 with the summary shape above.
openTaskCount counts only tasks with status not in ['done', 'cancelled'].
Unit test passes covering both happy path and empty vault (no projects).
No raw vault task body text or execution_notes leaked in response.
